comment: PINNED CONTRACT. Changes via PR only — same governance as lib/types/lot.js. The weekly DeepSeek V4 call proposes additions; Simon reviews and commits. The weak model (DeepSeek Flash) may only reference IDs that exist here.

personas.name: active_investor
personas.notes: Buys 2+ auction properties a year. Values speed and edge. Hates manual catalogue trawling.

personas.name: first_time_auction_buyer
personas.notes: Curious, nervous about legal packs and hidden risks. Wants reassurance and plain English.

personas.name: bridging_broker
personas.notes: Wants deal flow signals early. Follows auction activity to spot finance opportunities.

_personas_note: Personas are not yet selected by the weak model — reserved for prompt context and the weekly V4 proposal call.

hooks.text: The best lots go to the prepared.
What if {tedious_activity} took minutes, not evenings?
Auction day moves fast. Your research should keep up.

proof_points.text: We read catalogues from 170+ auction houses, so you don't have to.
Guide price, legal pack and key risks in one view.
Free to try, built for UK auction buyers.

ctas.text: Tap follow so the next bargain doesn't pass you by.
Connect for weekly auction market insight.

approved_claims.note: The ONLY approved scale claim. Any other '<number> auction houses' phrasing is blocked by gate 4.
